cards.rules_text: Whenever you cast your second or fourth spell each turn, you may sacrifice an artifact. If you do, copy that spell. You may choose new choices and targets for the copy.

Choose up to X, where X is the number of artifacts you control. You may choose the same modes more than once –
• Target player draws a card.
• Destroy target artifact.
• Steam Visions deals 2 damage to any target.
• Return target nonland permanent to its owner's hand.

{1}, {T}: Surveil 1.

When Shieldback Swarm enters, if its not a token, create a token that's a copy of it.
Whenever an opponent attacks, target attacking creature gets -2/-0 until end of turn.
When Rebirther Ouroboros dies, if its power is less than 8, create a token that's a copy of it, except its power and toughness are doubled.

When Rotmask Behemoth dies, you may sacrifice a creature. If you do, return Rotmask Behemoth from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.

You may pay {U} instead of paying this spell's mana cost. If you do, it enters with a 1/1 counter.
